title: Read-only audit in /Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public. Determine whether kernel-task-completion-backup / GHA recording is usable from Claude/FUGUE flows, not just Codex. Focus on workflow, local runner scripts, and any docs or workflows that invoke task completion backup from Claude/FUGUE...
summary_text: **Conclusion** `kernel-task-completion-backup` is **not wired as an automatic Claude/FUGUE flow artifact recorder today**. It is technically assistant-agnostic, but current production invocation paths are Codex-centric/local. **File evidence** - FUGUE mainframe path hands off to `fugue-codex-implement` (not backup workflow): [fugue-tutti-caller.yml](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/.github/workflows/fugue-tutti-caller.yml:787) - `fugue-codex-implement` runs Codex CLI (`@openai/codex`, `codex exec`) and has no backup-runner call: [fugue-codex-implement.yml](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/.github/workflows/fugue-codex-implement.yml:422) [fugue-codex-implement.yml](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/.github/workflows/fugue-codex-implement.yml:614) - Kernel completion/milestone wrappers hardcode `--assistant codex`: [kernel-run-complete.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/lib/kernel-run-complete.sh:115) [kernel-milestone-record.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/lib/kernel-milestone-record.sh:145) [kernel-milestone-record.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/lib/kernel-milestone-record.sh:194) - Backup runner itself is generic (`--assistant <name>`) and can dispatch GHA event `kernel-task-completion-backup`: [run-kernel-task-completion-backup.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/run-kernel-task-completion-backup.sh:167) [run-kernel-task-completion-backup.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/run-kernel-task-completion-backup.sh:132) - Backup workflow validates `.assistant` as any non-empty string (not codex-only): [kernel-task-completion-backup.yml](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/.github/workflows/kernel-task-completion-backup.yml:66) - There is a test proving explicit Claude payload works in runner mode: [test-kernel-task-completion-backup.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/tests/test-kernel-task-completion-backup.sh:29) - GHA recording is suppressed by default for non-critical milestone/run-complete (forces `--no-gha`): [kernel-run-complete.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/lib/kernel-run-complete.sh:94) [kernel-milestone-record.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/lib/kernel-milestone-record.sh:47) [test-kernel-run-complete.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/tests/test-kernel-run-complete.sh:75) **Audit callout** Current state is effectively a **Codex-only recording lane** for automatic flow integration; Claude/FUGUE paths do not invoke task-completion backup unless explicitly bridged.
